goal: Implement phase-A integration for 3-tier card system: add tier metadata on battle cards, expose level/tier validation helpers, and update card library UI to show stars and unlock status.
constraints: Do not alter card source chain or reduce the 170-card runtime baseline.
Prioritize additive, low-risk changes; avoid broad refactors.
If gameplay enforcement is not fully wired, keep logic as helper functions and reflect status clearly in UI.
deliverables: Tier-system utility module with unlock and quota validation helpers.
battleV2 card objects enriched with tier metadata (star tier + unlock level + rarity pass-through).
Card library panel updates showing star tier and lock hints based on current player level.
A short implementation note documenting what is active now vs reserved for next step.
